title: Ving Rhames ‘On His Way Home’ and ‘Cracking Jokes’ After Collapsing in Restaurant
content:
ByPat Saperstein

Deputy Editor

“Mission: Impossible” actorVing Rhamesis “on his way home” and feeling fine after a health scare in a Los Angeles-area restaurant on Wednesday, his rep confirmed. “He sounded like everyday Ving and cracked a joke over the phone,” manager Brad Kramer toldVariety.

The 66-year-old actor was rushed to the hospital Wednesday afternoon after collapsing at his table at Granville restaurant in North Hollywood, TMZ reported. Kramer said he was checked out and said he felt fine and “sounded like everyday Ving.”

Rhames, who also starred in “Pulp Fiction,” is the only actor besides Tom Cruise to appear in all eight “Mission: Impossible” movies. He played computer hacker Luther Stickell.

In 2025, Rhames starred in boxing movie “Uppercut” and mini-series “The Dope Thief” after reprising his role as Stickell in “Mission: Impossible – The Final Reckoning,” the conclusion to the saga.

Most recently, Rhames has been hosting the History Channel series “History’s Deadliest With Ving Rhames,” where he covers some of the most catastrophic natural disasters ever recorded. When the series premiered in March, Rhames talked toFox Newsabout working with Tom Cruise, saying “[My favorite memories] are talking to him off-stage,” said Rhames. “Learning secrets he knew about the industry that he was able to talk to me about.”

“[One big piece of advice is] to be in Hollywood, not of Hollywood,” he said in the interview. “And that’s just from years of experience.”

His upcoming films include “The Mongoose” with Liam Neeson and Marisa Tomei and “Painter” with Walton Goggins.
title_zh: 文·瑞姆斯(Ving Rhames)在餐廳昏倒後，正「回家的路上」並「開著玩笑」。
content_zh:
由帕特·薩珀斯坦(Pat Saperstein)

副編輯

《不可能的任務》(Mission: Impossible) 演員文·瑞姆斯(Ving Rhames) 在洛杉磯地區的一家餐廳經歷了一次健康危機後，已經“回家了”，並且感覺良好，他的代表確認了這一消息。經理布拉德·克雷默(Brad Kramer)告訴《綜藝》(Variety)：“他聽起來就像平常的文，並在電話中開了個玩笑。”

這位66歲的演員在星期三下午因在北好萊塢的格蘭維爾餐廳(Ganville)的桌子上昏倒而被緊急送往醫院，TMZ報導。克雷默表示，他接受了檢查，並表示感覺良好，“聽起來就像平常的文。”

文·瑞姆斯(Ving Rhames)也曾出演《低俗小說》(Pulp Fiction)，是除了湯姆·克魯斯(Tom Cruise)之外，唯一參與所有八部《不可能的任務》(Mission: Impossible) 電影的演員。他在片中飾演電腦駭客盧瑟·斯蒂克爾(Luther Stickell)。

在2025年，瑞姆斯主演了拳擊電影《上勾拳》(Uppercut) 和迷你劇《毒品小偷》(The Dope Thief)，並在《不可能的任務：最終清算》(Mission: Impossible – The Final Reckoning) 中重返斯蒂克爾的角色，這是該系列的結局。

最近，瑞姆斯一直在主持歷史頻道的系列節目《歷史上最致命的事件》(History’s Deadliest With Ving Rhames)，在節目中他介紹了一些有史以來最災難性的自然災害。當該系列在三月首播時，瑞姆斯在接受福克斯新聞(Fox News)訪問時談到了與湯姆·克魯斯的合作，表示：“[我最喜歡的回憶] 是在舞台下與他交談。”瑞姆斯說：“了解他知道的行業秘密，並能與我分享。”

他在訪談中提到的“一個重要建議是”要在好萊塢(Hollywood)中，而不是成為好萊塢的一部分。“這只是來自多年的經驗。”

他即將上映的電影包括與連恩·尼遜(Liam Neeson)和瑪莉莎·托梅(Marisa Tomei)合作的《獴》(The Mongoose) 以及與沃爾頓·戈金斯(Walton Goggins)合作的《畫家》(Painter)。
